purpose: Compact mandatory startup index. Keep details in specs, policies, JSONL, or raw.

tokenBudget.policy: Do not expand this file with full procedures. Link to detailed files instead.

startupRules: Use zh-TW. Be direct, pragmatic, actionable.
TaskStart may inject readId=read_xxxxx_YYYYMMDD for hook/runtime diagnostics only; AI should not mention it unless explicitly asked.
Search JSONL by task keywords; read raw only when index hits are insufficient.
Prefer active records; for close/conflicting matches prefer newer updatedAt, createdAt, timestamp; unverified does not override verified.
TaskComplete Hook is non-semantic and evidence-first: it writes pending_review packets to Memories/inbox and treats AI output as untrusted candidate.
Stable memory promotion requires Semantic Consolidation Task with evidence metadata; TaskComplete must not directly promote preferences, decisions, facts, or startup rules.
TaskStart writes Memories/runtime/current-task-start.json and reports inbox consolidation thresholds from consolidation-policy.json.

retrievalOrdering.status: active first; archived/superseded only for source tracing

writebackPolicy.stableMemoryPromotion: Only through Semantic Consolidation Task with evidence metadata.
writebackPolicy.taskLog: TaskComplete writes evidence task log and updates Memories/logs/index.md.

growthControl.archivePolicy: Archive/compact logs and JSONL when active indexes grow too large.
